db:select.doc:name: Select meal_id
db:select.db:sql: SELECT meal_id from meals where meal_id = :mealId AND user_id = :userId AND deleted_at IS NULL

validation:is-false.doc:name: meals not found
validation:is-false.message: Meal not found or has been deleted

logger.doc:name: Meal existence confirmed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Meal existence confirmed' var userId = { userId: vars.userId as String, mealId: vars.mealId as String } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO",logMessage,userId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

db:select.doc:name: Select meal items
db:select.db:sql: SELECT item_id, portion_id, portion_amount, quantity_g FROM meal_items WHERE item_id = :itemId AND meal_id = :mealId AND deleted_at IS NULL

validation:is-false.doc:name: Item not found
validation:is-false.message: Item not found or has been deleted

logger.doc:name: Meal item existence confirmed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Meal item existence confirmed' var userId = { userId: vars.userId as String, mealId: vars.mealId as String } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO",logMessage,userId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]
